products.name: Kutta Tactical Controller (KTAC)
products.descriptor: Rugged modular handheld UAS controller with ATAK/Android and Nett Warrior integration

evidence.snippet:
### Kutta Tactical Controller (KTAC)
The KTAC provides soldiers universal control for all types of uncrewed systems. The rugged, modular design uses smartphone technology and is designed to meet the environmental challenges of expeditionary on-the-move operations.
FEATURES:

• Open interfaces for rapid integration
• Compatibility with ATAK / Android Devices
• Stand-alone or integrate with Nett Warrior
[Learn More About KTAC](https://kuttatech.com/kutta-tactical-controller/)

products.name: Unified Ground Control Station (UGCS)
products.descriptor: STANAG 4586-compliant UAS command and control software with UGCS-C and UGCS-D variants

evidence.snippet:
Unified Ground Control Station
==============================
Unified Ground Control Station (UGCS)
-------------------------------------
[Request for Quote](/contact-us/)

• Exportable (UGCS-C)
• DO-178C certifiable architecture
• Army STANAG IOP compliant (UGCS-D)
• VSMs (i.e. Piccolo, MAVLink, Kestrel, etc.)
• OS independent (Linux, MS Windows, CentOS)
• Open, non-proprietary Interfaces based on UCS
• LOI 2, 3, 4 (MUM-T & Class C CUCS), 5 (Class A & B Handoff)

products.name: Small Mission Computer (SMC)
products.descriptor: Ruggedized embedded mission computer for UAS STANAG 4586 integration and vehicle-specific modules

evidence.snippet:
Small Mission Computer (SMC)
----------------------------
The SMC is a ruggedized, general-purpose computing device that can be used in a wide variety of applications.

*   Low power, ruggedized, versatile computing device
*   Can be utilized in a wide variety of mission-critical industrial and military applications
*   Designed for integration on Uncrewed Aerial Systems (UAS) and ground-based Vehicle Specific Modules (VSM) to achieve STANAG 4586 compliance

products.name: Transportable Ground Station (TGS)
products.descriptor: HMMWV-mounted S-788 shelter GCS with dual operator workstations for C2/ISR missions

evidence.snippet: The TGS consists of an S-788 – Light Multipurpose Shelter (LMS) mounted on a High Mobility Multipurpose Wheeled Vehicle (HMMWV). Designed to withstand rugged environmental conditions and extreme temperatures, the dual workstations facilitate mission planning and payload control for manned or uncrewed air vehicles.

products.name: Advanced Autonomy
products.descriptor: UAS autonomy engine combining auto-routing, RF LOS analysis, sensor footprint, and area survey algorithms

evidence.snippet:
Advanced Autonomy
=================
Advanced Autonomy
-----------------
[Request for Quote](/contact-us/)
Our auto-router, sensor footprint, radio frequency line-of-sight, and route-and-area survey algorithm can be combined to create a powerful autonomy engine for your uncrewed systems.

products.name: ISR Mission Planner
products.descriptor: DOD UCS-based ISR mission planning software automating route, area survey, and flight-test card generation

evidence.snippet:
ISR Mission Planner
===================
ISR Mission Planner
-------------------
[Request for Quote](/contact-us/)

MISSION PLANNER OUTPUT FEATURES:
• An easily readable flight-test card in PDF format for the pilot to utilize during the mission
• A digital file for visual reference so that onboard systems can utilize the planned data
